name: interbase
description: Open-source Interbase CLI and public extension packages.

scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/runtime-protocol typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-contracts typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-entitlements typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-session-turns typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-agent-backends typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-adapters typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-host typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-runtime-context typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-local-state typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-aliases-plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-goal-plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-computer-use-plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-telemetry typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-model-switching typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/plugin typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/sdk/js typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/cli-host typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:release && bun run --cwd packages/cli test && bun run --cwd packages/runtime-protocol test && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-contracts test && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-entitlements test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-session-turns test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-agent-backends test && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-adapters test && bun run --cwd packages/remote-runtime-host test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-runtime-context test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-local-state test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-compat test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-aliases-plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-goal-plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-computer-use-plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-telemetry test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-model-switching test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-provider-catalog-plugin test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-keychain test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-overlay test && bun run --cwd packages/cli-host test:public-boundary
scripts.test:cli-install-matrix: bun run release:cli:prepare -- --version 0.0.1 && bun run release:cli:verify
scripts.validate: bun run check:package-identity && bun run check:opencode-references && bun run check:legal-artifacts && bun run check:docs-install-consistency && bun run check:ci-workflow && bun run check:public-boundary && bun run check:public-secrets && bun run check:public-dependencies && bun run check:github-metadata && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build:packages && bun run test && bun run build:cli && bun run check:public-artifacts
